_publications._publicationTitle: Pharmacogenomic Synthetic Lethal Screens Reveal Hidden Vulnerabilities and New Therapeutic Approaches for Treatment of NF1-Associated Tumors.

_contextSnippet: The cardiac glycoside digoxin, which is clinically used to treat congestive heart failure, exhibited both a marked shift in IC50 concentration (∼1 log) and increased potency (∼40%) toward NF1−/− cells.
details: NF1-deficient iHSCs showed selective sensitivity to 27 compounds from HTS screening, with digoxin showing >1 log shift in IC50 and ~40% increased potency compared to NF1-proficient cells
